norwegian: Jeg er student på en skole.
english: I am a student at a school.

norwegian: Jeg kjøper en pen kjole til festen.
english: I am buying a pretty dress for the party.

english: There is a cold glass in the kitchen.

norwegian: Toget går fra Oslo til Bergen.
english: The train goes from Oslo to Bergen.

norwegian: Jeg vil ha en kopp kaffe.
english: I want a cup of coffee.

norwegian: Det er et glass på bordet.
english: There is a glass on the table.

norwegian: Jeg finner en nøkkel på gulvet.
english: I find a key on the floor.

english: He rents a room in the city centre.

norwegian: Det er ___ gate like ved skolen.
english: There is a street right by the school.

norwegian: De er ikke hjemme i dag.
english: They are not home today.

norwegian: Det er fint vær i dag.
english: The weather is nice today.

norwegian: Rommet er lite, men det er koselig.
english: The room is small, but it is cosy.

norwegian: Jeg drikker et kaldt glass vann.
english: I drink a cold glass of water.

norwegian: Vi bor i et lite, hvitt hus på landet.
english: We live in a small, white house in the countryside.

norwegian: Han spiser et ferskt eple hver dag.
english: He eats a fresh apple every day.

norwegian: Det er et ___ rom på hotellet.
english: There is a clean room at the hotel.

norwegian: Jeg har mange ___ venner på skolen.
english: I have many good friends at school.

english: There is a book on the table.

norwegian: Jeg ser en mann på gaten.
english: I see a man on the street.

norwegian: Jeg drikker ikke vann om morgenen.
english: I do not drink water in the morning.

norwegian: De har ikke penger til billetten.
english: They do not have money for the ticket.

norwegian: Jeg tar ikke bussen til skolen.
english: I do not take the bus to school.

norwegian: Det er seks stoler rundt bordet.
english: There are six chairs around the table.

norwegian: Butikken er åpen i ___ timer om dagen.
english: The shop is open for nine hours a day.

norwegian: Jeg vasket hendene før middag i går.
english: I washed my hands before dinner yesterday.

norwegian: Han bestilte mat på restauranten i går kveld.
english: He ordered food at the restaurant yesterday evening.

norwegian: Vi besøkte bestemoren vår forrige søndag.
english: We visited our grandmother last Sunday.

norwegian: Jeg pakket sekken min før skolen i går morges.
english: I packed my bag before school yesterday morning.

english: I see two boys in the park.

english: He has an old umbrella in his bag.

english: She wants to learn to cook.

english: I did not have time yesterday.
